productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl Pooh Pink And White Top
description: CompositionPink round neck blouse made of 100% cotton with white raglan puff sleeves and ruffles, zipper opening on the back and Pooh graphic on the front Wash care1. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis cute pink Pooh blouse from disney is perfect for your little princess.
